overall.description: Cinematic drone footage from Cyberpunk 2077 shows a Trauma Team medical vehicle in an abandoned waterfront plaza, then moves forward through a skate park revealing a futuristic cityscape with towering holographic advertisements along the coast.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned waterfront plaza with medical vehicle

events.description: camera begins smooth forward movement from behind the stationary vehicle
Trauma Team vehicle begins exiting frame left as camera passes alongside

agents.ego_description: piloting a camera drone forward past the medical vehicle toward the plaza

entered.detail: futuristic white and red medical vehicle with Trauma Team branding
large commercial structure with distinctive geometric metal framework roof
metal roller coaster tracks rising behind the mall building
scattered palm trees lining the left side of the plaza
curved concrete seating steps on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a stationary view behind a Trauma Team medical vehicle in a sunlit abandoned plaza. The camera begins moving forward, passing the vehicle while the grand mall building and roller coaster structure dominate the background. Concrete amphitheater steps line the left side as palm trees sway in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned skate park and waterfront plaza

events.description: Trauma Team vehicle completely exits view, revealing open skate park area
waterfront and distant city skyline with holographic towers become visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the skate park toward the waterfront

entered.detail: concrete skate park ramps and bowls with graffiti markings
wooden dock structures extending into the water
tall commercial towers with large holographic advertisements
calm ocean water visible beyond the plaza

segments.scene_description: Having passed the vehicle, the camera moves through an abandoned skate park with concrete ramps and graffiti. The view opens to reveal the waterfront and distant city skyline. The grand mall building and roller coaster shift to the left as futuristic holographic towers appear on the right horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with futuristic commercial towers

events.description: camera passes the skate park and enters the waterfront promenade area

agents.ego_description: moving along the waterfront path with the futuristic cityscape prominent on the right

entered.detail: covered market structures and stalls along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the waterfront promenade, leaving the skate park behind. Futuristic commercial towers with massive holographic billboards dominate the right side, growing larger as the camera approaches. Market stalls line the path while the calm ocean stretches out to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward camera movement from a desolate, sunlit plaza into a vibrant, futuristic coastal cityscape. It begins behind a stationary Trauma Team medical vehicle, gliding past it toward a grand mall and a towering roller coaster structure while palm trees sway beside concrete amphitheater steps. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts into an abandoned skate park filled with graffiti-covered ramps, causing the mall and coaster to recede to the left as holographic towers emerge on the right horizon. The scene then opens onto a waterfront promenade, leaving the skate park behind to reveal a calm ocean on the left and a line of market stalls. Finally, the view is dominated by massive commercial towers and glowing holographic billboards that grow larger as the camera advances deeper into the city.
